title: Compliance Analyst
top_reasons: Role is compliance and analyst focused, matching candidate's target roles | Fully remote, which is acceptable given candidate preference for hybrid or remote | Full-time employment aligns with candidate requirement | Job involves detailed regulatory compliance work, suitable for analytical career pivot
red_flags: Candidate lacks direct financial services or compliance experience required by job (4+ years in AML/KYC) | No certifications like CAMS or FINRA licenses mentioned that are preferred | Salary offered is relatively low ($60K) and no detailed compensation info available | Role may require more regulatory experience than candidate currently has
